description_long: This handbag features a bold, angular trapezoidal shape with a wide top opening and a narrower base, giving it a modern, architectural silhouette. The exterior is adorned with a vibrant, multicolored geometric pattern reminiscent of urban street art, incorporating shades of blue, black, yellow, red, and orange. Two sturdy, semi-rigid handles arch gracefully from the top edges, allowing for comfortable hand or forearm carrying. The surface appears to be made of a glossy, hard material, likely coated plastic or lacquered metal, which enhances the vividness of the printed design. The interior is not visible, but the structure suggests a hollow, spacious compartment suitable for carrying personal items. No visible brand logos, hardware, or additional decorative elements are present, emphasizing the striking pattern as the main visual feature.
description: A trapezoidal handbag with a glossy, multicolored geometric pattern and two arched handles, exuding a modern, urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile, vertical stripes, and the two parallel handles rising from the top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide opening, bold chevron pattern, and the full arch of the handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a mix of vertical stripes and geometric shapes, and both handles visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a broad chevron pattern in blue and gray tones, with the handles arching above.
attribute_strap_type: Two semi-rigid, short handles attached at the top edges, suitable for hand or forearm carrying; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; the top appears open.
attribute_pattern: Multicolored geometric pattern with chevrons, stripes, and abstract shapes.
